name: Meatless Cholent
recipeIngredient: 1-2 cups Green Giant Harvest fake meat for recipes
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray pot with cooking spray or use oil to saute onion until golden brown.
Add garlic and cook for a few more minutes.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (except diced tomatoes) along with enough water
to cover all ingredients, plus an additional 2 cups of water.
3. Bring mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for about one hour.
4. Stir in the canned tomatoes and place the pot on a blech over low flame.
Allow it to simmer until ready for Shabbos lunch.
